## Summary

<!-- One paragraph. What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] A maintainer explicitly asked for this PR in the linked issue
- [ ] `make all` passes locally (ruff + format + mypy + bandit + pytest)
- [ ] New code is at 100 % line and branch coverage
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `README.md` and `docs/`
- [ ] For new checks: entry point registered in `pyproject.toml`,
      README feature table updated, tests added under `tests/checks/`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an `[Unreleased]` entry describing the change

<!-- Trade-offs, deferred work, follow-up tickets. -->
